message:
test: coverage-tracked algebraic law property tests

Add comprehensive coverage-tracked property tests for all algebraic
law categories (asupersync-9w45):
- outcome_lattice: commutativity, worst-takes-all
- budget_semiring: associativity, commutativity
- cancel_strengthen: monotonicity
- timeout_composition, join_combinator, race_combinator, time_arithmetic

Uses InvariantTracker + proptest to ensure every law category gets
exercised and reports coverage at the end.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
